question: How does your skin feel a few hours after washing your face with a gentle cleanser?

options.label: Shiny and greasy all over
Tight, dry or flaky
Oily in the T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) but dry on cheeks
Red, itchy or irritated

question: How often does your skin look noticeably shiny throughout the day?

options.label: Always — within an hour of washing
Only in the T-zone by midday
Rarely — my skin tends to look matte or dull
Never — my skin stays consistently matte

question: How does your skin typically react when you try a new skincare product?

options.label: It often breaks out, turns red or burns
It sometimes feels drier or more irritated
It might feel a little tight at first
Usually no reaction — it adjusts quickly

question: How would you describe the size of your pores?

options.label: Large and very visible, especially on the nose and cheeks
Medium — visible mainly on the nose and chin
Small and barely visible
My pores are often red or inflamed-looking

question: How often do you experience breakouts or acne?

options.label: Frequently — clogged pores, blackheads, or pimples are common
Occasionally — mostly in the T-zone or before my period
Rarely — but when I do, they're red and inflamed
Rarely or never — breakouts aren't really my issue

question: How does your skin feel immediately after cleansing (without applying anything)?

options.label: Tight, dry and uncomfortable
Sensitive, slightly stinging or irritated
Clean but already producing some oil
Balanced — comfortable without needing moisturizer right away

question: Do you experience dry patches, flakiness, or rough texture on your face?

options.label: Yes, very often — especially around my mouth, nose, and eyebrows
Sometimes, especially in cold weather or after strong products
Occasionally in patches while other areas are oily
Rarely or never

question: How does your skin react to sun exposure?

options.label: Burns easily, turns red quickly — very reactive
Gets drier and more prone to flaking
Gets shinier and may break out more
Tans evenly without much sensitivity

question: What is your skin's overall texture like?

options.label: Thick, rough, with visible pores and blemishes
Thin, tight, sometimes flaky or crepey
Different textures in different zones — oily in some, dry in others
Often bumpy, rough, or uneven due to reactions

question: How often do you feel the need to blot or absorb excess oil from your face?

options.label: Multiple times a day — blotting papers are my best friend
Sometimes around my nose and forehead by afternoon
Rarely — my skin doesn't produce much oil
Never — excess oil is not something I deal with

question: How does your skin react to products containing alcohol or astringents?

options.label: Burns, stings, or turns red — I avoid them
Makes my skin feel very dry and tight
Feels refreshing and helps control shine
No strong reaction either way

question: How would you describe your T-zone (forehead, nose, and chin) specifically?

options.label: Very oily with large pores and frequent blackheads
Oilier than my cheeks but not excessively so
Dry or normal — my whole face is similar
Reactive and prone to redness, regardless of oiliness

question: How does your skin respond to cold, dry, or windy weather?

options.label: Becomes very dry, tight, and may crack or flake
Gets more sensitive, red, and easily irritated
Cheeks dry out but T-zone stays balanced
Doesn't change much — my skin handles weather well

question: If you wear makeup, how quickly does it break down or look worn throughout the day?

options.label: Very quickly — it slides off or oxidizes due to oil
Breaks down in the T-zone by afternoon
Settles into fine lines or looks cakey on dry patches
Irritates my skin or causes redness — I prefer minimal makeup

question: Which statement best describes your overall skin sensitivity?

options.label: Very sensitive — reacts to most products, weather changes, and even food
Somewhat sensitive — reacts to specific ingredients like fragrance or acids
Moderately balanced — mostly resilient with occasional reactions
Not very sensitive — my skin adapts easily to most conditions
